perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black vest over a white long-sleeve shirt, stands in a warehouse-style store holding a red mesh bag containing two orange pumpkins. (2) She lifts the pumpkins closer to the lens, touching the mesh and gesturing towards the produce while maintaining a cheerful facial expression. (3) She continues to showcase the pumpkins while interacting with someone off-camera, surrounded by stacks of cardboard boxes filled with similar produce in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music begins. A female voice speaks in an enthusiastic and high-pitched tone in Mandarin. (2) The acoustic environment includes a subtle hum of a large indoor space and distant indistinct chatter. A second female voice asks a question off-camera. (3) The primary female speaker continues her explanation, with the music maintaining a consistent volume throughout the segment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo and '總是特價' (Always on sale) in bright red and blue colors. (2) Functional Text: '南瓜特價180 一顆只要90元' (Pumpkin sale 180, 90 each) and '東昇南瓜' (Dongsheng Pumpkin) providing price and variety info. (3) Hook Text: '超級好吃超甜' (Super delicious and sweet) and '夠力' (Powerful/Strong) emphasize the speaker's review and specific cooking tips.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Showcase -> Taste Review -> Final Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the foreground, 1 female passerby briefly visible in the background aisle
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white high-neck long-sleeve shirt and a black button-up vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large warehouse retail environment with tall shelves, industrial lighting, and stacks of cardboard boxes containing pumpkins and other goods.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Price Comparison -> Personal Review -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a consumer recommendation for 'Dongsheng Pumpkins' at Costco. By showing the current discounted price and sharing a positive anecdotal experience regarding their sweetness and versatility in cooking (steaming/roasting), the creator aims to influence the audience's purchasing decisions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Reviewing a specific grocery item while explicitly mentioning the retailer, price point, and quality features.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style with oversized, colorful text hooks typical of short-form social media shopping guides.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical 'Costco find' tropes to engage budget-conscious shoppers looking for quality produce recommendations.
